description_long: This is a classic steam locomotive with a cylindrical metallic boiler, a prominent smokestack at the front, and a cowcatcher painted in red. The main body is silver-gray with visible rivets and bands, while the cab is green with black roof and window frames. The locomotive features large spoked wheels and two visible domes on top, likely for steam and sand. The front grill and headlamp are distinct, and the cab has rectangular windows on both sides. The overall design is utilitarian, with weathered textures suggesting heavy use and exposure to the elements.
description: A vintage steam locomotive with a silver boiler, green cab, red cowcatcher, and large spoked wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red cowcatcher, large smokestack, and headlamp centered above the boiler.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the silver boiler, green cab, two domes, and large spoked wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the green cab with two rectangular windows and the black roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the green cab, silver boiler, and red cowcatcher.
attribute_window_arrangement: two rectangular windows on each side of the cab
